skills.name: 01-hostfully
skills.description: Monitor STR bookings, guest check-ins/outs, maintenance alerts, owner updates from Hostfully PMS. Heartbeat every 15 min.

skills.name: 02-property-manager
skills.description: Maintenance triage, housekeeping coordination, vacancy alerts, vendor management. Classify EMERGENCY/URGENT/ROUTINE/COSMETIC.
skills.trigger: On maintenance request or vacancy alert

skills.name: ppd-pipeline
skills.description: AirDNA PPD lead pipeline. Filters by bedrooms, revenue, country. Enriches via Apollo/Clay, pushes to Instantly campaigns.

skills.name: 03-agent-browser
skills.description: Autonomous web browsing, Airbnb/VRBO competitor price scraping, listing monitoring. Daily 6am comp check.

skills.name: stu-agent
skills.description: STU command router on Flowise. GHL contact lookups, Make.com triggers, Instantly campaign status, Apollo enrichment, system health.

skills.name: 13-voice
skills.description: Vapi inbound/outbound calls with ElevenLabs TTS. Discord voice commands. PAM agent active.
skills.trigger: Inbound calls via Vapi webhook, Discord voice

skills.name: 12-slack
skills.description: Bi-directional Slack integration. Pipeline updates and booking alerts. Team commands STU from Slack.
skills.trigger: Pipeline events, booking alerts, Slack commands

skills.name: 14-pdf-documents
skills.description: Generate PDF reports, client performance summaries, franchise proposals from live data. Delivers via Discord or Gmail.

skills.name: 04-tavily
skills.description: AI-native web research, prospect research, market intelligence. Structured results replace standard web search.

skills.name: 05-mission-control
skills.description: Aggregate tasks across GHL, Hostfully, GitHub, blockers into one daily brief. Runs 7:30am and 5pm.

skills.name: 07-adhd-founder-planner
skills.description: Prioritized time-blocked daily plan from GHL, Hostfully, blockers. Built for ADHD founder workflow.
skills.trigger: "plan my day", "morning planning", "what should I focus on"

skills.name: 09-secureclaw
skills.description: Harden STU, detect prompt injection, audit skills for vulnerabilities. Sunday 2am scan. Discord alerts on threats.

skills.name: 10-audit-trail
skills.description: Tamper-evident hash-chained log of every STU action. Silent always. Action history and compliance reports.

skills.name: 08-agent-audit
skills.description: Audit STU performance, credit consumption, ROI across all skills. Monday 8am. Flags idle or costly skills.

skills.name: 06-capability-evolver
skills.description: STU autonomously improves itself by analyzing command gaps and writing new skills. Runs 3am nightly.

skills.name: 11-cron-backup
skills.description: Daily automated backups of SOUL.md, CONTEXT.md, dashboard, Flowise flows, all skill files. 30-day retention.
